title: Prepare vehicle substrates for refinishing
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare vehicle substrates for refinishing demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.3 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.3 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.3 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Remove surface rust and apply primers

pcs.text: Remove surface rust and scale from substrate according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Protect or remove substrate components affected by application processes according to workplace procedures2.3 Clean surfaces to be painted and remove contaminants 2.4 Apply primers and primer surfaces according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove surface rust and scale from substrate according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Protect or remove substrate components affected by application processes according to workplace procedures2.3 Clean surfaces to be painted and remove contaminants 2.4 Apply primers and primer surfaces according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove surface rust and scale from substrate according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Protect or remove substrate components affected by application processes according to workplace procedures2.3 Clean surfaces to be painted and remove contaminants 2.4 Apply primers and primer surfaces according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Remove surface rust and apply primers

elements.title: Prepare primed and sealed surface for refinishing

pcs.text: Prepare surfaces to be refinished according to workplace procedures3.2 Record and report identified surface defects

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare surfaces to be refinished according to workplace procedures3.2 Record and report identified surface defects.

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
